---
title: "Mohamed Bakr"
subtitle: "Data Scientist & ML Engineer"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: assets/images/profile-pic.jpg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohdbakr/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Mohdbakr
    - icon: globe
      text: Portfolio
      href: https://portfolio.mohdbakr.com
sidebar: false
---

Helping businesses make better decisions through data science, probability, and machine learning.

I build educational content and practical tools that bridge the gap between statistical theory and real-world applications — in both English and Arabic.
